"C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\Community\Common7\IDE\CommonExtensions\Microsoft\CMake\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\syux.dir/objects.a
"D:\gcc msys2\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe" qc CMakeFiles\syux.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\syux.dir\objects1.rsp
"D:\gcc msys2\ucrt64\bin\g++.exe" -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\syux.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o syux.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libsyux.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\syux.dir\linkLibs.rsp
